# $2^{\circ}$ 多重积分中的变量代换 若

1)函数 $f(x_{1},x_{2},\dots ,x_{n})$ 在有界可测区域 $\Omega$ 内是一致连续的；  
2)连续可微函数 $x_{i} = \varphi_{i}(\xi_{1},\xi_{2},\dots ,\xi_{n})(i = 1,2,\dots ,n)$ ，把 $Ox_{1},x_{2},\dots ,x_{n}$ 空间内的区域 $\Omega$ 一一映射成 $O^{\prime}\xi_{1},\xi_{2},\dots ,\xi_{n}$ 空间内的有界区域 $\Omega^{\prime}$   
3)在区域 $\Omega^{\prime}$ 内雅可比行列式 $I = \frac{D(x_1,x_2,\cdots,x_n)}{D(\xi_1,\xi_2,\cdots,\xi_n)}\neq 0$

则成立公式

$$
\iint_ {\Omega} \dots \int f (x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}) d x _ {1} d x _ {2} \dots d x _ {n} = \iint_ {\Omega^ {\prime}} \dots \int f (\xi_ {1}, \xi_ {2}, \dots , \xi_ {n}) | I | d \xi_ {1} d \xi_ {2} \dots d \xi_ {n}.
$$

特别是，根据公式

$$
x _ {1} = r \cos \varphi_ {1},
$$

$$
x _ {2} = r \sin \varphi_ {1} \cos \varphi_ {2},
$$

：

$$
x _ {n - 1} = r \sin \varphi_ {1} \sin \varphi_ {2} \dots \sin \varphi_ {n - 2} \cos \varphi_ {n - 1},
$$

$$
x _ {n} = r \sin \varphi_ {1} \sin \varphi_ {2} \dots \sin \varphi_ {n - 1}
$$

变换成极坐标 $(r, \varphi_1, \varphi_2, \dots, \varphi_{n-1})$ 时，有

$$
I = \frac {D \left(x _ {1} , x _ {2} , \cdots , x _ {n}\right)}{D \left(r , \varphi_ {1} , \cdots , \varphi_ {n - 1}\right)} = r ^ {n - 1} \sin^ {n - 2} \varphi_ {1} \sin^ {n - 3} \varphi_ {2} \dots \sin \varphi_ {n - 2}.
$$

【4201】设 $K(x,y)$ 为区域 $R[a \leqslant x \leqslant b, a \leqslant y \leqslant b]$ 内的连续函数，且

$$
K _ {n} (x, y) = \int_ {a} ^ {b} \int_ {a} ^ {b} \dots \int_ {a} ^ {b} K (x, t _ {1}) K (t _ {1}, t _ {2}) \dots K (t _ {n}, y) d t _ {1} d t _ {2} \dots d t _ {n},
$$

证明： $K_{n + m + 1}(x,y) = \int_a^b K_n(x,t)K_m(t,y)\mathrm{d}t.$

证

$$
\begin{array}{l} K _ {n + m + 1} (x, y) \\ = \int_ {a} ^ {b} \int_ {a} ^ {b} \dots \int_ {a} ^ {b} K (x, t _ {1}) K (t _ {1}, t _ {2}) \dots K (t _ {n}, t) K (t, z _ {1}) K (z _ {1}, z _ {2}) \dots K (z _ {m}, y) d t _ {1} d t _ {2} \dots d t _ {n} d t d z _ {1} d z _ {2} \dots d z _ {m} \\ = \int_ {a} ^ {b} \left\{\left[ \int_ {a} ^ {b} \int_ {a} ^ {b} \dots \int_ {a} ^ {b} K (x, t _ {1}) K (t _ {1}, t _ {2}) \dots K (t _ {n}, t) d t _ {1} d t _ {2} \dots d t _ {n} \right] \right. \\ \left. \cdot \left[ \int_ {a} ^ {b} \int_ {a} ^ {b} \dots \int_ {a} ^ {b} K (t, z _ {1}) K (z _ {1}, z _ {2}) \dots K (z _ {m}, y) d z _ {1} d z _ {2} \dots d z _ {m} \right] \right\} d t \\ = \int_ {u} ^ {b} K _ {n} (x, t) K _ {m} (t, y) d t. \\ \end{array}
$$

【4202】设 $f = f(x_{1},x_{2},\dots ,x_{n})$ 为区域 $0\leqslant x_{i}\leqslant x(i = 1,2,\dots ,n)$ 内的连续函数，证明等式：

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} \mathrm {d} x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} f \mathrm {d} x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n} \int_ {x _ {n}} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n - 1} \dots \int_ {x _ {2}} ^ {x} f \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \quad (n \geqslant 2).
$$

证 考虑下面三个有界闭区域：

$$
\Omega = \left\{\left(x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}\right) \mid 0 \leqslant x _ {i} \leqslant x, i = 1, 2, \dots , n \right\},
$$

$$
\Omega_ {1} = \left\{\left(x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}\right) \mid 0 \leqslant x _ {1} \leqslant x, 0 \leqslant x _ {2} \leqslant x _ {1}, \dots , 0 \leqslant x _ {n} \leqslant x _ {n - 1} \right\},
$$

$$
\Omega_ {2} = \left\{\left(x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}\right) \mid 0 \leqslant x _ {n} \leqslant x, x _ {n} \leqslant x _ {n - 1} \leqslant x, \dots , x _ {2} \leqslant x _ {1} \leqslant x \right\}.
$$

由假定 $f(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})$ 在区域 $\Omega$ 上连续，显然， $\Omega_1\subset \Omega ,\Omega_2\subset \Omega$ ，故 $f(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})$ 在 $\Omega_{1}$ 与 $\Omega_{2}$ 上连续.根据化 $_{n}$ 重积分为累次积分的公式，我们有

$$
\iint_ {\Omega_ {1}} \dots \int f d x _ {1} \dots d x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} d x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} d x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} f d x _ {n}, \tag {1}
$$

$$
\iint_ {\Omega_ {2}} \dots \int f d x _ {1} \dots d x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} d x _ {n} \int_ {x _ {n}} ^ {x} d x _ {n - 1} \dots \int_ {x _ {2}} ^ {x} f d x _ {1}. \tag {2}
$$

下证 $\Omega_{1} = \Omega_{2}$ ，事实上，若 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{1}$ ，则

$$
0 \leqslant x _ {1} \leqslant x, 0 \leqslant x _ {2} \leqslant x _ {1}, \dots , 0 \leqslant x _ {n} \leqslant x _ {n - 1}, \tag {3}
$$

从而， $0\leqslant x_{n}\leqslant x_{n - 1}\leqslant x_{n - 2}\leqslant \dots \leqslant x_{2}\leqslant x_{1}\leqslant x.$ (4）

于是， $0\leqslant x_{n}\leqslant x,x_{n}\leqslant x_{n - 1}\leqslant x,\dots ,x_{2}\leqslant x_{1}\leqslant x.$ (5）

由此可知 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{2}$ .反之，若 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{2}$ ，则(5)式成立.从而，（4)式显然成立，由此又知(3)式成立，故 $(x_{1},\dots ,x_{n})\in \Omega_{1}$ ，于是， $\Omega_1 = \Omega_2$ 获证.由此，再根据(1)式与(2)式，即得

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} \mathrm {d} x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} f \mathrm {d} x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n} \int_ {x _ {n}} ^ {x} \mathrm {d} x _ {n - 1} \dots \int_ {x _ {2}} ^ {x} f \mathrm {d} x _ {1}.
$$

证毕.

【4203】证明： $\int_0^t\mathrm{d}t_1\int_0^{t_1}\mathrm{d}t_2\dots \int_0^{t_{n - 1}}f(t_1)f(t_2)\dots f(t_n)\mathrm{d}t_n = \frac{1}{n!}\left\{\int_0^t f(\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau \right\} ^n$ ，其中 $f$ 为连续函数.

提示 利用数学归纳法.

证 证法1：

我们有 $\int_{0}^{t}\mathrm{d}t_{1}\int_{0}^{t_{1}}\mathrm{d}t_{2}\dots \int_{0}^{t_{n - 1}}f(t_{1})f(t_{2})\dots f(t_{n})\mathrm{d}t_{n}$

$$
= \int_ {0} ^ {t} f (t _ {1}) d t _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {1}} f (t _ {2}) d t _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 2}} f (t _ {n - 1}) d t _ {n - 1} \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 1}} f (t _ {n}) d t _ {n}.
$$

令 $F(s) = \int_{0}^{s}f(\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau.$ 由于 $f$ 是连续函数，故 $F^{\prime}(s) = f(s)$ .我们有（注意到 $F(0) = 0$ ）

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n}} f (t _ {n - 1}) d t _ {n - 1} \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 1}} f (t _ {n}) d t _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 2}} F (t _ {n - 1}) f (t _ {n - 1}) d t _ {n - 1} = \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 2}} F (t _ {n - 1}) F ^ {\prime} (t _ {n - 1}) d t _ {n - 1} \\ = \frac {1}{2} [ F (t _ {n - 1}) ] ^ {2} \left| \begin{array}{l} t _ {n - 1} - t _ {n - 2} \\ t _ {n - 1} = 0 \end{array} \right. = \frac {1}{2} [ F (t _ {n - 2}) ] ^ {2}, \\ \end{array}
$$

由此

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 3}} f (t _ {n - 2}) \mathrm {d} t _ {n - 2} \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 2}} f (t _ {n - 1}) \mathrm {d} t _ {n - 1} \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 1}} f (t _ {n}) \mathrm {d} t _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 3}} \frac {1}{2} [ F (t _ {n - 2}) ] ^ {2} F ^ {\prime} (t _ {n - 2}) \mathrm {d} t _ {n - 2} \\ = \frac {1}{3 !} \left[ F \left(t _ {n},\right) \right] ^ {3}, \\ \end{array}
$$

中

这样继续下去，显然有

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {t _ {1}} f (t _ {2}) \mathrm {d} t _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 2}} f (t _ {n - 1}) \mathrm {d} t _ {n - 1} \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {n - 1}} f (t _ {n}) \mathrm {d} t _ {n} = \frac {1}{(n - 1) !} [ F (t _ {1}) ] ^ {n - 1}.
$$

于是， $\int_0^t f(t_1)\mathrm{d}t_1\int_0^{t_1}f(t_2)\mathrm{d}t_2\dots \int_0^{t_{n - 1}}f(t_n)\mathrm{d}t_n = \int_0^t\frac{1}{(n - 1)!} [F(t_1)]^{n - 1}f(t_1)\mathrm{d}t_1$

$$
= \frac {1}{(n - 1) !} \int_ {0} ^ {t} [ F (t _ {1}) ] ^ {n - 1} F ^ {\prime} (t _ {1}) d t _ {1} = \frac {1}{n !} [ F (t) ] ^ {n} = \frac {1}{n !} \left\{\int_ {0} ^ {t} f (\tau) d \tau \right\} ^ {n}.
$$

从而， $\int_0^t\mathrm{d}t_1\int_0^{t_1}\mathrm{d}t_2\dots \int_0^{t_{n - 1}}f(t_1)f(t_2)\dots f(t_n)\mathrm{d}t_n = \frac{1}{n!}\left\{\int_0^t f(\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau \right\} ^n.$

证毕.

证法2：

用数学归纳法证明所述公式. 当 $n = 1$ 时此公式显然成立. 今设 $n = k$ 时公式成立, 要证 $n = k + 1$ 时公式也成立. 我们有

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {t} \mathrm {d} t _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {1}} \mathrm {d} t _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {k}} f (t _ {1}) f (t _ {2}) \dots f (t _ {k + 1}) \mathrm {d} t _ {k + 1} = \int_ {0} ^ {t} f (t _ {1}) \left[ \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {1}} \mathrm {d} t _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {k}} f (t _ {2}) \dots f (t _ {k + 1}) \mathrm {d} t _ {k + 1} \right] \mathrm {d} t _ {1}.
$$

由于假定公式当 $n = k$ 时成立，故

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {\prime 1} \mathrm {d} t _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {\prime k} f (t _ {2}) \dots f (t _ {k + 1}) \mathrm {d} t _ {k + 1} = \frac {1}{k !} \left\{\int_ {0} ^ {\prime 1} f (\tau) \mathrm {d} \tau \right\} ^ {k}.
$$

从而（令 $F(s) = \int_0^s f(\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau$ ，则 $F^{\prime}(s) = f(s))$

$$
\begin{array}{l} \int_ {0} ^ {t} \mathrm {d} t _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {1}} \mathrm {d} t _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {t _ {k}} f (t _ {1}) f (t _ {2}) \dots f (t _ {k + 1}) \mathrm {d} t _ {k + 1} = \int_ {0} ^ {t} f (t _ {1}) \cdot \frac {1}{k !} \left\{\int_ {0} ^ {t _ {1}} f (\tau) \mathrm {d} \tau \right\} ^ {k} \mathrm {d} t _ {1} = \frac {1}{k !} \int_ {0} ^ {t} [ F (t _ {1}) ] ^ {k} F ^ {\prime} (t _ {1}) \mathrm {d} t _ {1} \\ = \frac {1}{(k + 1) !} [ F (t _ {1}) ] ^ {k + 1} = \frac {1}{(k + 1) !} \left\{\int_ {0} ^ {r} f (\tau) d \tau \right\} ^ {k + 1}, \\ \end{array}
$$

因此，所述公式当 $n = k + 1$ 时成立.于是，由数学归纳法知，所述公式对一切正整数 $\pmb{n}$ 均成立.证毕
